description: Offline and live red-team dataset manifest. Local files are small safe samples/export-shape fixtures; production red-team runs should export permitted rows from the upstream public datasets into the same JSONL schema.

datasets.description: Sample/export shape for prompt-injection classifier datasets with text + label columns.
datasets.license_note: Sample rows in this repo are synthetic. Export the upstream dataset according to its license before large-scale evals.

datasets.description: Sample/export shape for Lakera PINT-style prompt-injection detector evaluation.
datasets.license_note: Sample rows in this repo are synthetic. Use the upstream benchmark according to its license and evaluation rules.

datasets.description: Sample/export shape for PromptInject-style direct prompt injection prompts.
datasets.license_note: Sample rows in this repo are synthetic. Use upstream PromptInject/garak assets according to their licenses.

datasets.description: Sample/export shape for JailbreakBench-style jailbreak behavior prompts.
datasets.license_note: Sample rows in this repo are synthetic. Export upstream rows according to JailbreakBench safety and license guidance.

datasets.description: Sample/export shape for HarmBench-style adversarial behavior prompts. Keep live runs in isolated dev/staging tenants only.
datasets.license_note: Sample rows in this repo are non-harmful placeholders. Export upstream rows only when your evaluation environment is approved for safety testing.

datasets.description: BIPIA-style indirect prompt injection shape for poisoned retrieved documents.
datasets.license_note: Sample rows in this repo are synthetic. Export upstream BIPIA rows according to its license before large-scale evals.

datasets.description: Maci-specific RAG and tool-output poisoned-channel cases for application-boundary testing.
